name: INTEST CORP
sic_description: Instruments For Meas & Testing of  Electricity & Elec Signals
summary: InTest Corporation is a diversified test and measurement company providing thermal management products, electronic test equipment, and related services. The company serves multiple end markets including semiconductor automated test equipment (ATE), Auto/Electric Vehicle, Defense/Aerospace, Industrial, Life Sciences, and Safety/Security sectors. InTest pursues growth through its VISION 2030 Strategy, focusing on market diversification beyond the semiconductor ATE market and potential acquisitions.
